# 💝 Sponsor V-COMM

Thank you for considering sponsoring V-COMM! Your support helps us continue developing the most secure communication platform possible.

## 🎯 Why Sponsor?

V-COMM is an open-source project with a mission to provide secure, private communication for everyone. Your sponsorship helps us:

- 🔐 **Advance Security Research** - Develop cutting-edge cryptographic implementations
- 🚀 **Accelerate Development** - Fund full-time developers to build features faster
- 📚 **Improve Documentation** - Create comprehensive guides and tutorials
- 🌍 **Expand Language Support** - Translate V-COMM into more languages
- 🏗️ **Infrastructure Costs** - Cover server, CI/CD, and hosting expenses

## 🏆 Sponsor Tiers

### 🥉 Bronze Sponsors - $5/month
- Name listed in our README
- Special Discord role
- Early access to releases

### 🥈 Silver Sponsors - $25/month
- All Bronze benefits
- Logo on our website
- Priority feature requests
- Monthly newsletter

### 🥇 Gold Sponsors - $100/month
- All Silver benefits
- Logo in README and documentation
- Quarterly video calls with the team
- Input on roadmap priorities

### 💎 Diamond Sponsors - $500/month
- All Gold benefits
- Logo prominently featured
- Dedicated support channel
- Custom feature development consideration
- Annual sponsor spotlight post

### 🏢 Enterprise Sponsors - Custom
- Custom tier benefits
- SLA agreements available
- Dedicated account manager
- On-site training (if applicable)
- [Contact us](mailto:sponsors@vcomm.app) for details

## 🤝 Corporate Sponsorship

We welcome corporate sponsors! If your company uses V-COMM or believes in secure communication, consider becoming a sponsor. Benefits include:

- Brand visibility in the open-source community
- Support for security-focused technology
- Employee engagement opportunities
- Tax-deductible donation (via Open Collective)

[Contact us](mailto:sponsors@vcomm.app) to discuss corporate sponsorship options.

## 📊 Transparency

We believe in transparency. As a sponsored project, we publish quarterly reports showing:

- Total funds received
- How funds were allocated
- Development progress
- Infrastructure costs
- Future spending plans

Reports are published on our [Open Collective page](https://opencollective.com/vcomm).

## 🙏 Thank You

Every contribution, no matter the size, helps us build a more secure future for digital communication. Thank you for considering sponsoring V-COMM!

---

*If you can't sponsor financially, there are other ways to help:*
- ⭐ Star the repository
- 🐛 Report bugs and suggest features
- 📝 Improve documentation
- 💬 Spread the word about V-COMM
- 🤝 Help other users in our community
